w2:textbox.style: position:absolute; left:56px; top:32px; width:396px; height:28px; align:middleleft; text-align:middleleft;
w2:textbox.label: ※ 해지원리금이 원화인 경우만 표시됩니다. (외화대체 해지분은 미표시)

w2:textbox.style: position:absolute; left:56px; top:8px; width:616px; height:28px; align:middleleft; text-align:middleleft;
w2:textbox.label: ※ 투자성, 보장성(방카슈랑스) 상품은 해지원리금 등록이 불가합니다. (대출 신규 전/후 1개월 동안 재예치 불가)

w2:textbox.style: position:absolute; left:56px; top:56px; width:666px; height:28px; align:middleleft; text-align:middleleft;
w2:textbox.label: ※ 해지원리금 월환산금액은 정액적립식의 재예치 가능 여부 판정을 위해 산출되는 금액으로 산출 방식은 아래와 같습니다.

w2:textbox.style: position:absolute; left:73px; top:80px; width:171px; height:28px; align:middleleft; text-align:middleleft;
w2:textbox.label: - 정액적립식:약정 월불입금액

w2:textbox.style: position:absolute; left:73px; top:104px; width:763px; height:28px; align:middleleft; text-align:middleleft;
w2:textbox.label: - 정액적립식 외: 계약기간이 있는 경우 [해지원리금(세후)/계약기간(월환산)], 계약기간이 없는 경우 [해지원리금(세후)/예치기간(월환산)]

xf:image.style: position:absolute; left:12px; top:48px; width:40px; height:48px; color:rgb(0,0,0); align:left; font-size:10pt; letter-spacing:0; font-weight:400;

w2:textbox.style: position:absolute; left:333px; top:10px; width:18px; height:28px; align:middlecenter; text-align:middlecenter;
w2:textbox.label: 원

w2:textbox.style: position:absolute; left:38px; top:10px; width:127px; height:28px;
w2:textbox.label: 재예치가능잔액(A-B)

w2:textbox.style: position:absolute; left:56px; top:12px; width:508px; height:28px; align:middleleft; text-align:middleleft;
w2:textbox.label: 아래 결과는 현재 시점의 예상 조회이므로 실제 거래(실행)시와는 내용이 달라질 수 있습니다.

xf:image.style: position:absolute; left:12px; top:1px; width:40px; height:48px; color:rgb(0,0,0); align:left; font-size:10pt; letter-spacing:0; font-weight:400;

w2:textbox.style: position:absolute; left:56px; top:9px; width:625px; height:28px; align:middleleft; text-align:middleleft;
w2:textbox.label: 조회기준일자 입력방법 : 수신신규/여신취급을 위한 사전조회(조회구분-1) → 수신신규(예정)/여신취급(예정)일자

xf:image.style: position:absolute; left:12px; top:8px; width:40px; height:48px; color:rgb(0,0,0); align:left; font-size:10pt; letter-spacing:0; font-weight:400;

w2:textbox.style: position:absolute; left:193px; top:27px; width:320px; height:28px; align:middleleft; text-align:middleleft;
